body_txt: The shenanigans that sitcom characters get up to in their living space almost always inevitably result in damage to their suite at some point — usually to the walls. To avoid the expensive costs of repair, or to hide the damage from their parents or Cranky Landlord , the characters will try to cover the damage with a poster, painting, or other decor one might typically hang on a wall. In most cases, the damage is in an unusual spot where decorations would generally not be mounted or is severe enough that it couldn't have been hidden in the first place. A Sub-Trope of Hide the Evidence .
